title: A Lead from Inside
content: TIME TO MEET MILLER ALONE.||You find him in a secluded corner of the precinct's records room, where the air is stale and the fluorescent lights hum with an annoying buzz.||You don't say much. You simply place the evidence of his 'extracurricular' activities on the table. The offshore transfers, the street meetings—whatever it was, it's enough to end his career.||Miller's bravado evaporates. He looks like a man facing a firing squad. 'Wait, Detective. Don't... don't do anything rash. I have something. A case that's been eating at me. I'll give you the man who really killed Vane.'
